candidate.objective: Experienced Poly Welder and Plant Operator with over 15 years of industry experience across civil, mining, and resource sectors. Proven expertise in HDPE pipeline installation, spool fabrication, butt welding, and supervision of large welding crews. Holds qualifications in Skid Steer, Excavator, Telehandler, Forklift, EWP, and Dogman. Site-inducted with FMG and Rio Tinto. Committed to safe, high-quality workmanship on every project.

duties: HDPE pipeline installation across a range of civil and mining projects.
Spool fabrication to project specifications and engineering drawings.
Butt welding using industry-standard equipment and procedures.
Operation of plant and machinery as required on site.
Butt welding of HDPE pipelines across multiple project sites.
Supervision and coordination of a welding crew of up to 20 personnel.
Facilitated toolbox talks and safety meetings to maintain site compliance.
Machinery maintenance and operational support across project lifecycle.
Dewatering operations and dam lining works.
Dam lining construction across civil project sites.
Civil works including earthworks and site preparation.
Supervisory and leading hand responsibilities across site activities.

skills.detail: HDPE pipeline installation, spool fabrication, butt welding using McElroy and Dixon machines.
Skid Steer, Excavator, Telehandler, Forklift, EWP.
Dogman ticket holder with experience in rigging and crane operations.
Experienced leading hand and supervisor; toolbox talks, crew coordination, safety compliance.
Dam lining and dewatering operations across mining and civil sites.

certifications.details: Licence to operate skid steer loader.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
